MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL MAZZIO OF THE GLOBAL LEGAL RESOURCES, LLP, TEL. NO. (888) 846-8901
APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMBER FLOORING INC.'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement - Per the stipulation for settlement placed on the record, it appears that Brad Oldenbrook is the only party against whom judgment was to be entered and that other parties were to be dismissed. Stipulated judgment did not include attorney fees. Moving party shall revised the proposed orders accordingly. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Continued To Oct-10-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Re Notice Request For Default Prove Up Hearing
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduloed for Default Prove Up Hearing in Dept 514. Judge: Donald J. Sullivan. Clerk: S. Vantree. Reporter: S. Wong #11228.

James C. Huber, Esq appears for plaintiff Amber Flooring Inc.
Plaintiff's witness Or Dobrin, placed under oath and testifies.
Appearance by Brad Oldenbrook, for the defendant Adriyl Design Centers. Inc.

After the parties met outside of the courtroom, the parties settled the matter as follows:

Brad Oldenbrook agrees to by the sum of $13,500.00 within 24 months of today's date. $1000.00 will be paid to plaintiff within 2 weeks of today's date by Brad Oldenbrook. The balance of $12,500.00 will be due by July 9, 2014. If the payment of $1000.00 is not received, the defendant will be in default and the plaintiff will be owed the sum of $20,000.00 plus 10 percent interest from today's date until paid in full.

Counsel to submit a stiplated judgment for the court to review and sign.

Request For Default Prove Up Hearing
